summary: v1.4 milestone initialized — roadmap written, awaiting user approval before commit

results.description: GSD planning docs updated with post-v1.3 state (32 tools, 614 tests, npm v1.8.2)
Research phase complete — 4 parallel researchers (Stack, Features, Architecture, Pitfalls) + synthesizer
Requirements defined — 24 requirements across SPEC/QUAL/EVAL/TUNE categories
Roadmap written — 5 phases (15-19), all 24 requirements mapped, awaiting user approval before git commit
results.notes: ROADMAP.md and updated REQUIREMENTS.md/STATE.md are written but NOT yet committed. Next step: user approves roadmap, then commit with: git add -f .planning/ROADMAP.md .planning/STATE.md .planning/REQUIREMENTS.md && git commit. Then display completion banner with next step: /gsd:discuss-phase 15 or /gsd:plan-phase 15

summaries: Decision: Use blackboard pattern for agent coordination instead of pipeline/message-passing
Decision: Build bottom-up: utils → storage → engine → embeddings → tools → server
Decision: Embedded HTTP dashboard using native Node.js http module, vanilla HTML/JS, cytoscape.js for graph, vis-timeline for timeline
Decision: Triage of TWINING_ARCH_REVIEW.md — 7 valid gaps, 3 invalid/already-addressed, 3 partial
Warning: Potential conflict: new decision may conflict with 4 existing decision(s)
Finding: v1.0 milestone complete — all 3 phases shipped (storage+engine, embeddings+context, graph+lifecycle)
Finding: v1.1 milestone in progress — commit hash linking implemented (phase 4), further phases TBD
Finding: Phase 5 complete: PlanningBridge read/write + Serena docs — 262 tests passing, 5/5 requirements met
